content: Hey, I'm Aiden, an electrician running my own business in Chicago, IL. I'm trying to optimize my daily routine to be more productive.
Hi Aiden! Congratulations on your business. What's a typical day like for you now?
I wake up at 6:00 AM, have a cup of coffee, and start responding to emails. I usually have a few appointments with clients throughout the day.
That sounds busy! Do you have any time for hobbies or self-care?
I love hiking and beekeeping in my free time. I also enjoy 3D printing and home brewing beer.
Those are unique hobbies! It's great that you have interests outside of work. How do you balance your work and personal life?
To be honest, it's been a challenge since I left the Bay Area and started my business. But I'm trying to prioritize my time better. I've been using a planner to stay organized.
That's a great idea! Using a planner can really help with time management. What are your goals for the next quarter?
I'd like to expand my business and hire a few more employees. I've been thinking about attending a conference in New York City on March 15th to network and learn more about the industry.
That sounds like a great opportunity! Networking can be really beneficial for growing your business. Have you thought about how you'll manage your workload while you're away at the conference?
Yeah, I've been thinking about that. I'll probably ask my colleague, Rachel, to cover for me while I'm away. She's been a huge help since I started the business.
It's great that you have a supportive team. Let's work on creating a plan for your business expansion and conference attendance.
I'd also like to start a podcast about aquariums, which is another one of my hobbies. Do you think that's a good idea?
That's an interesting idea! Starting a podcast can be a fun way to share your passions with others. We can discuss the details and feasibility of starting a podcast later.
I've been listening to a lot of podcasts lately, and I think it could be a great way to connect with like-minded people. Maybe I can even interview some experts in the field.
That's a great idea! Interviewing experts can add a lot of value to your podcast. Let's brainstorm some potential topics and guests for your podcast.
I've also been thinking about starting a YouTube channel for my 3D printing hobby. Do you think that's a good idea?
That's another great idea! Starting a YouTube channel can be a fun way to share your creations with others. We can discuss the details and feasibility of starting a YouTube channel later.
I think it could be a great way to showcase my projects and connect with other 3D printing enthusiasts. Maybe I can even share some tutorials and tips.
That's a great idea! Sharing tutorials and tips can be really helpful to others. Let's work on creating a plan for your YouTube channel and podcast.
